response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe, and deep technical breadth across languages and systems, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or cloud-based RAG systems, and his resume overemphasizes side projects and non-core skills like DLang and photography, diluting the GenAI/enterprise cloud narrative.
strengths: Current Staff Software Engineer at Stripe working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Proven experience building scalable systems on AWS and cloud-native platforms
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or RAG architectures; AI experience appears recent
Lacks explicit mention of vector databases, LLM metrics, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph
Resume is overly broad, mixing embedded, GIS, and photography projects that dilute core GenAI focus
